atoms.desc: CLI interface: dispatch-validate.sh --dispatch <payload.json> [--strict] [--trace]. Exit codes: 0=approved, 1=malformed, 2=ambiguous atom, 3=dependency cycle, 4=invalid model, 5=unknown verb/target.
Schema validation: validate payload against TKT-0321 Appendix A atom schema. Reject malformed JSON with exit 1.
Discovery detection: scan atoms for ambiguous verbs (figure out, work with, handle) and reject with exit 2. Demand proper Pass 1 breakdown.
Dependency cycle check: topological sort atom DAG, reject cycles with exit 3.
Model assignment validation: cross-reference each atom model against TKT-0322 matrix. Reject with exit 4 if model not in allowed tiers for agent.
Verb/target validation: whitelist valid verbs (READ|WRITE|EXECUTE|ANALYZE|SYNTHESIZE|TRANSFORM|SEND|VALIDATE|WEB_SEARCH|WEB_FETCH). Reject unknown with exit 5.
Tier 3 governance lock: if agent is Shield/Lex/Sage/Warden, reject any non-gemma4:31b-cloud model assignment.
Token budget enforcement: verify maxTokens per atom does not exceed tier limit (Tier 0=500, Tier 1=2000, Tier 2=8000, Tier 3=300).
Agent config migration: add routing blocks to all 14 agent configs per TKT-0322 Section 6 schema. Light Agents first, then Heavy, then Gate.
Cost monitoring hooks: track tier distribution, Tier 2 token avg, Tier 3 reasoning leaks, fallback rate, override rate.
Violation logging: write violations to JSON log per TKT-0321 Appendix C format (violationId, timestamp, agent, dispatchId, type, severity, details, resolution).
Integration test: end-to-end dispatch test with valid+invalid payloads covering all 6 exit codes (0 through 5).

acceptance_criteria.desc: dispatch-validate.sh gates ALL dispatches. Tested with 5+ dispatch types across all 6 exit codes.
All 14 agent configs have routing blocks matching TKT-0322 matrix.
Tier 3 governance lock active — non-gemma4 model assignment rejected for Shield/Lex/Sage/Warden.
JSON schema validation matches TKT-0321 Appendix A spec.
Token budgets enforced per tier: Tier 0=500, Tier 1=2000, Tier 2=8000, Tier 3=300.
Platform daily injected token burn reduced from 79K to ≤40K (measured over 7-day observation).
Violation log written per TKT-0321 Appendix C format.
Integration test passes: valid dispatch (exit 0), malformed (exit 1), ambiguous (exit 2), cycle (exit 3), invalid model (exit 4), unknown verb (exit 5).
